page.title: Intelligence Workspace
page.description: Role-gated customer and product signals for agent-assisted selling.
page.workspaceDescription: Epic 19 stories add the intelligence cards, tables, and MCP-backed insights here.
page.placeholder: The intelligence feature gate is active. Sales, admin, and owner users can access this workspace while the remaining analytics stories land in sprint order.

customerProfile.title: Product Profile
customerProfile.description: What this customer buys, how often they order, and which categories are newly active.
customerProfile.activityBasis: Based on confirmed, shipped, and fulfilled orders.
customerProfile.topCategoriesDescription: Revenue mix across the last 12 months.
customerProfile.topProductsDescription: Products ranked by order count in the last 12 months.

customerBuyingBehavior.title: Customer Buying Behavior
customerBuyingBehavior.description: Compare segment-level category mix, cross-sell lift, and month-by-month buying patterns.
customerBuyingBehavior.empty: No qualifying customer buying behavior for this segment yet.
customerBuyingBehavior.emptyCrossSell: No cross-sell opportunities meet the support threshold yet.
customerBuyingBehavior.loadError: Failed to load customer buying behavior.

productPerformance.title: Product Performance
productPerformance.description: Rank products by current-versus-prior revenue and lifecycle stage.

reason.new: First sale landed inside the current comparison window.
reason.end_of_life: No current-window revenue and the last sale was at least 6 complete months ago.
reason.declining: Current revenue fell below 80% of the prior comparison window.
reason.growing: Current revenue is at least 20% above the prior comparison window.
reason.mature: More than 24 months on sale with revenue holding near the prior window.
reason.stable: Current revenue remained positive without triggering another lifecycle rule.

productPerformance.empty: No qualifying products for this comparison window.

affinity.title: Product Affinity Map
affinity.description: Customer-level co-purchase pairs scored by overlap and Jaccard affinity.
affinity.loadError: Failed to load product affinity map.

categoryTrends.title: Category Trend Radar
categoryTrends.description: Rolling demand signals across categories, with current-vs-prior period comparison.
categoryTrends.activityBasis: Based on confirmed, shipped, and fulfilled order-line demand.

riskSignals.title: Customer Risk Signals
riskSignals.description: A ranked outreach queue across dormant, at-risk, growing, stable, and new accounts.
riskSignals.loadError: Failed to load customer risk signals.
riskSignals.noSignals: No secondary signals for this account.

prospectGaps.title: Prospect Gap Analysis
prospectGaps.description: Find active non-buyers who look like strong fits for a target category.
prospectGaps.empty: No whitespace prospects for this category yet.
